safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomics risk detection
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor improper bends and overreaching to flag ergonomic risks and score severity using body angulation.

evidence.quote: We have improper bends, overreachings, such as any ergonomic related observations here, and then person to vehicle, so person to pit, proximity and pit to pit proximity.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So improper bend and overreaching, basically it captures, you know, vast majority of overhead and then, you know, bending down behaviors that we would, that we would, that you would expect to see.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So everything's using the RIVA score and then we'll, we'll, we'll, um, mark the severity of the incidents based off the angulations of the body.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>
